scope.target: Verbatim downstream feedback intake and current-state reconciliation
constraints: Treat feedback as evidence rather than canonical truth

steps: Identify the latest completed downstream workflow
Map recommendations to current source evidence
validation: Source and copied blob IDs match
execution.last_completed_step: Imported blob e16ae94c79cc22c109e41e1d740b7c3fe84a56e1 and reconciled nine DSFB findings.

results.summary: Retained the v0.1.0 downstream feedback with repository, commit, workflow, path, blob, and SHA-256 provenance, then separated resolved, partial, and open recommendations.
results.residual_risk: Feedback conclusions may become stale as later tasks remediate the source; the copied artifact remains immutable historical evidence.
